reason: Replace the unsupported country and lender rate presets with an assumption-first fixed-rate mortgage planning engine. The user supplies the currency, principal, quoted or scenario rate, term, down payment, fees, taxes, insurance and other costs. The engine calculates principal and interest, all-in monthly cost, upfront cash, loan-to-value, total interest percentage, a five-year comparison, a stress-rate scenario and annual amortisation without presenting a lender quote or approval decision. No protected golden fixture existed, so the new engine registration has no carried result delta.
